name: Boston Chicken Saucer Sized Chocolate Chip Co
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolates together, stirring until smooth.
2. Pour into a greased 9-inch metal pie pan and refrigerate until hard.
3. Break into pea-sized bits and store refrigerated until ready to use.
4. Use about 1/3 cup of cookie dough, flattening it to a 3-1/2 to 4-inch round.
5. Bake at 375°F for 16 to 18 minutes or until golden brown but not overbaked; cookies will be hard as rocks if baked too long.
6. Allow the cookies to cool on sheets for a few minutes after baking.
